headline: Micron surges 19% on blockbuster earnings, chip sector rallies
detail: Micron's massive beat signals strong AI-driven memory demand and healthier chip fundamentals across the board. This directly lifts your SMH (already your only green position) and gives AVGO a short-term bounce — your best opportunity to trim into strength at better prices.

headline: Core inflation hits 3.4%, highest since October 2023
detail: The Fed's preferred inflation gauge running hotter pushes rate-cut expectations even further out. Higher-for-longer rates are a direct headwind for high-multiple tech names like PLTR and CRWD, which need cheap money narratives to hold their valuations — bad backdrop for names already in the red.

headline: Apple raises MacBook and iPad prices due to memory crunch
detail: Apple citing a memory crunch confirms tight supply conditions that benefit chip makers short-term, supporting the Micron rally and broader SMH strength. However, higher device prices could dampen consumer demand downstream, a slow-burn risk for the ecosystem your chip names depend on.
